name: Hot and Sour Soup II
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring 4 cups of vegetable broth to a boil.
2. Turn off the heat and add dried mushrooms. Cover and allow to soak for about 20 minutes.
3. Drain mushroom soaking water into a large pot and add 4 cups of water. Turn on the heat to bring the liquid to a boil.
4. As the liquid is heating, cut stems off the mushrooms and slice the mushrooms very thinly.
5. Cut tofu into thin matchstick slivers and spread a little soy sauce on top.
6. When the liquid comes to a boil, reduce heat to medium and add the sliced mushrooms. Simmer for about 10 minutes.
7. Add the tofu slices and simmer another 5 minutes.
8. Add apple cider vinegar and dissolve arrowroot in cold water (quickly stir until smooth).
9. Pour this mixture into the pot with the soup and stir constantly until the arrowroot thickens (about 20–30 seconds after the liquid returns to a boil).
10. Cover, turn off the heat, add toasted sesame oil, and serve immediately, topped with slivered green onions.
11. Makes eight servings of about 1 cup each.
